message:
fix(actor): drop guard for on_stop mask_depth prevents leak across restarts

If on_stop panics in a supervised actor, the manual mask_depth decrement
was skipped, leaving mask_depth >= 1 for the restarted actor. This caused
cx.checkpoint() to silently skip cancellation checks, making the restarted
actor uncancellable. The drop guard ensures cleanup even on panic unwind.

Batch 205 audit (16,280L, 5 files): bin/asupersync.rs SOUND,
test_logging.rs SOUND, builder.rs SOUND, config.rs 1 LOW noted,
actor.rs 1 MEDIUM fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
